certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys). When operated in approved mode.
certificate.description: The HP Poly Cryptographic Module is a general-purpose cryptographic library incorporated into the CCX line of products to provide FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for the protection of sensitive information.
